privileged_info_summary: The create_chart task has no explicit metadata field in task.json. The task operates on AAPL historical stock price data from January 2, 2024 to June 28, 2024 (124 trading days). The data file stock_market_data.xlsx contains real market data with verified AAPL closing prices: January 2, 2024 close was 183.903 (actual historical: ~184.53), and June 28, 2024 close was 209.198 (actual historical: ~209.64). All dates are valid business days (Monday-Friday) with OHLCV structure: columns A (Date), B (Open), C (High), D (Low), E (Close), F (Volume). The task requires selecting columns A and E to create a Line Chart on the same sheet and saving via Ctrl+S.
